'''鈭歭-p-t''' ('''kalapat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photograph|photograph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photograph|photograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| kalapat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilapat|thilapat]] || [[word:jilapat|jilapat]] || [[word:shilapat|shilapat]] || [[word:kilapat|kilapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulapat|thuthulapat]] || [[word:jujulapat|jujulapat]] || [[word:shushulapat|shushulapat]] || [[word:kukulapat|kukulapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulapat|thulapat]] || [[word:julapat|julapat]] || [[word:shulapat|shulapat]] || [[word:kulapat|kulapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulapat|thulapat]] || [[word:julapat|julapat]] || [[word:shulapat|shulapat]] || [[word:kulapat|kulapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelapat|thelapat]] || [[word:jelapat|jelapat]] || [[word:shelapat|shelapat]] || [[word:kelapat|kelapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholapat|thotholapat]] || [[word:jojolapat|jojolapat]] || [[word:shosholapat|shosholapat]] || [[word:kokolapat|kokolapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholapat|tholapat]] || [[word:jolapat|jolapat]] || [[word:sholapat|sholapat]] || [[word:kolapat|kolapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholapat|tholapat]] || [[word:jolapat|jolapat]] || [[word:sholapat|sholapat]] || [[word:kolapat|kolapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lapat|th忙lapat]] || [[word:j忙lapat|j忙lapat]] || [[word:sh忙lapat|sh忙lapat]] || [[word:k忙lapat|k忙lapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalapat|thathalapat]] || [[word:jajalapat|jajalapat]] || [[word:shashalapat|shashalapat]] || [[word:kakalapat|kakalapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalapat|thalapat]] || [[word:jalapat|jalapat]] || [[word:shalapat|shalapat]] || [[word:kalapat|kalapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalapat|thalapat]] || [[word:jalapat|jalapat]] || [[word:shalapat|shalapat]] || [[word:kalapat|kalapat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalapat|shalapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalapat|goshalapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalapat|gokishalapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalapatn眉|shalapatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalapatnkn眉|goshalapatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapatn眉|gokishalapatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalapatsh毛|shalapatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalapatnksh毛|goshalapatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalapatsh毛|gokishalapatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapatro|shalapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapatnkro|goshalapatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapatro|gokishalapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapatmu|shalapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapatnkmu|goshalapatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapatmu|gokishalapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalapatsher|shalapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalapatnksher|goshalapatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalapatsher|gokishalapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalapatng|shalapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalapatnkng|goshalapatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalapatng|gokishalapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalapatya|shalapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalapatnkya|goshalapatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalapatya|gokishalapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalapatyam|shalapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalapatnkyam|goshalapatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalapatyam|gokishalapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapatn眉sh毛|shalapatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapatnkn眉sh毛|goshalapatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapatn眉sh毛|gokishalapatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapatn眉ro|shalapatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapatnkn眉ro|goshalapatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapatn眉ro|gokishalapatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapatn眉mu|shalapatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapatnkn眉mu|goshalapatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapatn眉mu|gokishalapatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapatsh毛n眉|shalapatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapatnksh毛n眉|goshalapatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapatsh毛n眉|gokishalapatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapatsh毛ro|shalapatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapatnksh毛ro|goshalapatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapatsh毛ro|gokishalapatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapatsh毛mu|shalapatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapatnksh毛mu|goshalapatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapatsh毛mu|gokishalapatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapatron眉|shalapatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapatnkron眉|goshalapatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapatron眉|gokishalapatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapatrosh毛|shalapatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapatnkrosh毛|goshalapatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapatrosh毛|gokishalapatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapatromu|shalapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapatnkromu|goshalapatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapatromu|gokishalapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapatmun眉|shalapatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapatnkmun眉|goshalapatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapatmun眉|gokishalapatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapatmush毛|shalapatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapatnkmush毛|goshalapatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapatmush毛|gokishalapatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapatmuro|shalapatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapatnkmuro|goshalapatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapatmuro|gokishalapatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
